title: A Resolution Approving the Sangguniang Kabataan Annual Budget of Barangay Bagong Silang, Los Baños, Laguna for the Year 2022 in the Amount of Two Hundred Sixty One Thousand Seven Hundred Thirty One and 70/100 Pesos Only (P 261,731.70). (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 7/18/2022)
